scope_note: QA Law of Harmonics Cert family [149]: certifies Iverson's formal law of harmonic resonance between QN products. Two QNs sharing all but one prime factor each are harmonic; harmony ratio = min(id1,id2)/max(id1,id2) measures resonance strength. All QN products divisible by 6. Source: Ben Iverson QA-3 Ch 4 Theory of Harmony.
